title: Active Management and Performance Measurement: Which of the following is NOT a common characteristic measured...
summary: Analyze a portfolio management concept related to Active Management and Performance Measurement.
prompt: Which of the following is NOT a common characteristic measured in portfolio performance evaluation?

options.text: Measures ability to meet short-term obligations
Liquidity is not directly a measure of performance

solution: Liquidity is not directly a measure of performance; it is more related to the ease of buying or selling an asset without affecting its price.
